prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS turbocharger kit (model GT-SS42) paired with the 2GR-FSE (3.5L V6) engine, utilizing a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and HKS Hi-Power exhaust with 76mm dual outlets to optimize spool and reduce backpressure

Full standalone ECU replacement with Haltech Elite 2500, featuring a custom 2GR-FSE-specific calibration map, individual cylinder fuel trims, and launch control optimized for the 6-speed automatic (AB60F) transmission with a Paddle-Shift Conversion Kit by JUN Auto

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Crown Athlete G-specific valving), Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars, and Whiteline adjustable rear camber arms to correct the factory 2.1° negative camber for aggressive cornering
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (Crown Athlete G-specific, 30mm front and 40mm rear fender flares) paired with a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF hood, OEM-style latches) featuring a 50mm vent for heat extraction from the HKS turbo setup

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) with custom wheel spacers (5mm front, 10mm rear) to fill the Vertex fender gaps

Full OEM+ interior restomod with Bride Gias II reclining bucket seats (Crown Athlete G-specific mounting brackets), Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (with airbag delete), and a custom rear seat delete panel (carbon fiber, by AutoTechnic Japan) for weight reduction
